name: Dark Maze
short_description: Your task is to get out of the maze. For this, you need to find the key!
detailed_description:
Your task is to get out of the maze.
For this, you need to find the key!
Beware of bloodthirsty monsters, they are ready for anything to taste your flesh!
Run faster if they see you!
In the game you have to go through a large number of levels,
Each has its own peculiarity!
And remember ... You must survive!


Features:
- Many terrible monsters waiting for you at every step
- You have no weapons, all that you can do - run away!
- Various levels, many quests
- The further you went, the harder it is to get out!
